steps.title: Find the target meaning
steps.content: The name “breathes” bravery, life, and courage to the tribe. In this figurative language, the name must express or communicate these qualities to the people who regard the man as their chief.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content: ”Imparts” means to communicate or convey something abstract like knowledge or virtue to people—exactly the meaning the passage requires. The other choices don't fit: renounces means to reject, assents means to agree, absorbs means to take in. This matches choice A — A is correct.
